social_media_video_templates.title: Viral Dance Challenge
social_media_video_templates.description: AI-generated dance video with trending audio and effects

prompt_structure.scene: Modern studio with LED backdrop, ring light setup
prompt_structure.subject: Dynamic performer in trendy streetwear
prompt_structure.action: Synchronized dance moves matching beat drops
prompt_structure.camera: Handheld style with quick zoom transitions
prompt_structure.effects: Speed ramping, freeze frames on beat, motion blur transitions

engagement_elements.hook: First 3 seconds crucial - start with signature move

social_media_video_templates.ai_generation_notes: Ensure fluid motion, accurate lip sync if applicable, trending fashion styles

social_media_video_templates.title: Smooth Transition Showcase
social_media_video_templates.description: Product or outfit changes with seamless transitions

prompt_structure.scene: Clean, aesthetic background - minimalist or branded
prompt_structure.subject: Model or product in center frame
prompt_structure.action: Quick cuts, spins, hand swipes for transitions
prompt_structure.effects: Match cuts, whip pans, digital glitch transitions

engagement_elements.hook: Preview all items in first 2 seconds

social_media_video_templates.ai_generation_notes: Maintain consistent lighting, perfect alignment between transitions, brand consistency

social_media_video_templates.title: Educational Quick Tips
social_media_video_templates.description: Fast-paced educational content with strong hook

prompt_structure.scene: Professional setup with graphics overlay capability
prompt_structure.subject: Expert presenter with confident delivery
prompt_structure.action: Direct to camera, hand gestures, prop demonstrations
prompt_structure.camera: Slight movement, crash zooms for emphasis
prompt_structure.effects: Lower thirds, animated text, progress indicators

engagement_elements.hook: Question or shocking statement in first 3 seconds

social_media_video_templates.ai_generation_notes: Clear speech synthesis, accurate info graphics, professional appearance

social_media_video_templates.title: Professional Success Story
social_media_video_templates.description: Career insights and professional development content

prompt_structure.scene: Modern office or professional home setup
prompt_structure.subject: Business professional in appropriate attire
prompt_structure.action: Thoughtful presentation, whiteboard demos, screen shares

social_media_video_templates.ai_generation_notes: Business appropriate styling, clear articulation, data visualization when needed

social_media_video_templates.title: Breaking News Style Update
social_media_video_templates.description: Quick, punchy video for viral thread potential

prompt_structure.scene: News desk style or on-location reporting
prompt_structure.subject: Presenter with urgent delivery
prompt_structure.action: Direct address, quick cuts, B-roll inserts

social_media_video_templates.ai_generation_notes: Current events context, fact-checking graphics, clear audio even on mobile

social_media_video_templates.title: DIY Tutorial Idea Pin
social_media_video_templates.description: Step-by-step visual guide for Pinterest audience

prompt_structure.scene: Bright, aesthetic workspace with overhead shots
prompt_structure.subject: Hands demonstrating technique, minimal face time
prompt_structure.effects: Soft transitions, text overlays for steps

social_media_video_templates.ai_generation_notes: Pinterest-perfect lighting, trending color palettes, clear process visualization

social_media_video_templates.title: AR Filter Showcase

prompt_structure.scene: Real environment with AR overlay space
prompt_structure.subject: User interacting with AR elements
prompt_structure.action: Face movements, hand gestures, environment interaction

social_media_video_templates.ai_generation_notes: Realistic AR integration, smooth tracking, engaging animations

social_media_video_templates.title: Community Engagement Story
social_media_video_templates.ai_generation_notes: Authentic feel, local landmarks if applicable, warm color grading

social_media_video_templates.title: Unfiltered Daily Moment
social_media_video_templates.description: Raw, authentic capture with dual camera view

prompt_structure.subject: Natural state, no preparation
prompt_structure.camera: Dual view - front and back simultaneously

social_media_video_templates.ai_generation_notes: Natural lighting only, no beauty filters, realistic imperfections included

social_media_video_templates.ai_generation_notes: Clear speech, readable text overlays, discussion-worthy content
